errors.message: Market account is invalid or does not match expected PDA
errors.name: invalidMarket

errors.message: Authority invalid or does not match the market authority
errors.name: invalidAuthority

errors.message: Market is paused
errors.name: marketPaused

errors.message: The auction is not in the phase required for this instruction
errors.name: auctionWrongPhase

errors.message: The order slab is full (orders-per-auction cap reached)
errors.name: orderSlabFull

errors.message: Order not found in the slab
errors.name: orderNotFound

errors.message: Order price is invalid (zero, or not aligned to the tick size)
errors.name: invalidPrice

errors.message: Order quantity is invalid
errors.name: invalidQuantity

errors.message: Order quantity is zero
errors.name: zeroQuantity

errors.message: Completeness check failed: not every active order has been accumulated
errors.name: auctionNotComplete

errors.message: Order has already been accumulated into the histogram
errors.name: orderAlreadyAccumulated

errors.message: Clearing has not been finalized yet (no ClearingResult available)
errors.name: clearingNotFinalized

errors.message: Price does not fall on a valid tick within the histogram range
errors.name: invalidTick

errors.message: Event authority PDA is invalid
errors.name: invalidEventAuthority

errors.message: Order side byte is invalid (must be 0 = buy or 1 = sell)
errors.name: invalidOrderSide

errors.message: Order does not belong to the provided trader
errors.name: invalidOrderOwner

errors.message: Auction id mismatch between accounts
errors.name: auctionIdMismatch

errors.message: Order is in an invalid state for this operation
errors.name: invalidOrderStatus

errors.message: Arithmetic overflow during clearing math
errors.name: mathOverflow

errors.message: Provided account does not belong to this market
errors.name: accountMarketMismatch

errors.message: Oracle account is not a valid Pyth price update
errors.name: oracleInvalidAccount

errors.message: Oracle feed id does not match the expected feed
errors.name: oracleFeedMismatch

errors.message: Oracle price update is stale
errors.name: oracleStale

errors.message: Oracle reported a non-positive price
errors.name: oracleNegativePrice

errors.message: Not enough free collateral
errors.name: insufficientCollateral

errors.message: Position is not liquidatable
errors.name: notLiquidatable

errors.message: Token account or mint does not match the vault
errors.name: invalidCollateralAccount

errors.message: Settle with a non-zero fill is missing required position/collateral accounts
errors.name: missingSettleAccounts

errors.message: Oracle confidence interval is too wide
errors.name: oracleConfidenceTooWide

errors.message: Order quantity is below the minimum order size
errors.name: orderBelowMinimum

errors.message: Per-trader order cap reached for this auction
errors.name: traderOrderCapReached

errors.message: Market configuration parameter is out of range
errors.name: marketConfigOutOfRange

errors.message: Collection window is still open; accumulation cannot start yet
errors.name: auctionWindowOpen

errors.message: Insurance pool is insolvent for this payout
errors.name: insuranceInsolvent

errors.message: Liquidation made no progress
errors.name: liquidationNoProgress

errors.message: Oracle is soft-stale; extraction is blocked
errors.name: oracleSoftStale

errors.message: Cross-margin group is full
errors.name: marginGroupFull

errors.message: Position is already in the cross-margin group
errors.name: marginMemberDuplicate

errors.message: Cross-margin instruction is missing member positions
errors.name: incompletePortfolio

errors.message: Cross-margin member market is stale (reserved)
errors.name: marginMarketStale

errors.message: Account is not at the expected pre-migration layout
errors.name: notMigratable

errors.message: Position is not a member of the cross-margin group
errors.name: marginMemberNotFound

errors.message: Oracle publish time is in the future
errors.name: oracleFutureTimestamp

errors.message: Cross-margin collateral ledger drift
errors.name: collateralLedgerDrift

errors.message: Order would exceed the market's max position notional
errors.name: positionLimitExceeded

errors.message: Shard id is out of range for this market
errors.name: shardOutOfRange

errors.message: Order expiry is already reached at submit time
errors.name: orderAlreadyExpired

errors.message: No pending update of this kind
errors.name: noPendingUpdate

errors.message: Pending update delay has not elapsed
errors.name: pendingDelayNotElapsed

errors.message: Market is not quiescent
errors.name: marketNotQuiescent

errors.message: Order would exceed the market's open-interest cap
errors.name: openInterestCapExceeded

errors.message: Vault backing invariant violated
errors.name: vaultInvariantViolated

docs: Random keypair seed for the market PDA
accounts.name: marketSeed

docs: AuctionHistogram PDA (the mailboxes) to be created
accounts.name: histogram

docs: Oracle (Pyth PriceUpdateV2) recorded on the market; consumed by funding/liquidation
accounts.name: oracle

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: Market the order belongs to. Read-only (Design Z): submit writes only its own shard.
accounts.name: market

docs: OrderSlab SHARD to insert into. Stage A sharding: a market has num_slab_shards slabs at seeds [b"order_slab", market, shard_id.to_le_bytes()]. The client resolves the shard PDA for the chosen `shard_id` (least-full / hash) and passes it here; the processor validates the PDA against `shard_id`.
accounts.name: orderSlab

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: (Optional) trader's Position; required on a money-path market to reserve margin
accounts.name: position

docs: (Optional) trader's collateral ledger; locks the order's worst-case initial margin
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: Market the order belongs to. Read-only (Design Z): cancel writes only its own shard.
accounts.name: market

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: (Optional) trader's collateral ledger; releases the order's reserved margin
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission

accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: (Optional) cranker's collateral ledger to receive the crank fee
accounts.name: crankerCollateral

docs: (Optional) fee/insurance pool the crank fee is drawn from
accounts.name: vault

docs: OrderSlab SHARD holding the order (Stage A sharding: seeds [b"order_slab", market, shard_id]). The client passes the shard the order lives in (known from the OrderSubmitted event's shard_id); the processor validates its PDA.
accounts.name: orderSlab

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: (Optional) order owner's Position to apply the fill to
accounts.name: position

docs: (Optional) owner's collateral ledger; locks initial margin on the fill
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: (Optional) supplies the maintenance-margin bps and the insurance pool that floats PnL/fees/socialized loss (mutated on a non-zero fill)
accounts.name: vault

docs: (Optional) integrator ledger to receive a share of a positive fee
accounts.name: integratorCollateral

docs: Market's bound Pyth oracle; the new round's tick window is re-snapped onto it (known-issues §2.7). Stale price carries the previous window forward. Stage A: shards are drained by reset_shard first; the roll gates on shards_ready == num_slab_shards.
accounts.name: oracle

docs: Market whose bound oracle is read
accounts.name: market

docs: Pyth PriceUpdateV2 account bound to the market
accounts.name: oracle

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: SPL token account owned by the vault authority PDA
accounts.name: vaultTokenAccount

docs: UserCollateral PDA to create (seeds [collateral, owner, vault.collateral_mint])
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: Per-collateral vault whose collateral_mint scopes the ledger (CR-3)
accounts.name: vault

docs: Owner's collateral ledger (mint-scoped: seeds [collateral, owner, vault.collateral_mint], CR-3)
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: Per-collateral vault (the total_user_balance aggregate is updated, §3.4)
accounts.name: vault

docs: Owner's collateral ledger (mint-scoped: seeds [collateral, owner, vault.collateral_mint], CR-3)
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: Per-collateral vault (aggregate updated + backing gate checked, §3.4/§4.2)
accounts.name: vault

docs: Pyth PriceUpdateV2 account bound to the market
accounts.name: oracle

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: Market the position trades (writable: advances the braked mark + OI/social indices)
accounts.name: market

docs: Pyth PriceUpdateV2 account bound to the market
accounts.name: oracle

docs: Event authority PDA for CPI event emission
accounts.name: eventAuthority

docs: Tempo program, for self-CPI event emission
accounts.name: tempoProgram

docs: First OrderSlab shard to clear. ALL of the market's shards must follow as additional trailing writable accounts (shards [b"order_slab", market, shard_id.to_le_bytes()] for every shard_id in [0, num_slab_shards)); the processor requires shards.len() == num_slab_shards.
accounts.name: orderSlab

docs: MakerQuote PDA to create (client resolves [b"maker_quote", market, maker, quote_index] — §4.9 multi-quote seeds)
accounts.name: makerQuote

docs: (Optional) the MAKER's mint-scoped collateral ledger (reservation delta-locked here); REQUIRED on a money-path market, omitted on clearing-only
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: (Optional) the MAKER's ledger (the standing reservation is released here); required iff the quote carries a reservation
accounts.name: userCollateral

docs: Owner of both the group and position
accounts.name: owner

docs: Flat position to bind (mode set to cross)
accounts.name: position

docs: OrderSlab scanned to reject an in-flight order

docs: OrderSlab; must be settled (quiescence gate for the OI rebuild)
